ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race/ethnicity category */,
  "all_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "ever_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number ever hospitalized */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the data */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_race_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES race_ethnicities ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_ethnicities" (
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race/ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race/ethnicity */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population for the race/ethnicity */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the race/ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention impacting the health metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric affected */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect observed */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Quantified size of the effect */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the effect observed */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Statistical significance of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race/ethnicity category */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Total population size */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the demographic group */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the demographic group */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the demographic group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES race_ethnicities ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data from the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)
